title: Please help Coco find a home
description: GEORGE NEWS - If you are looking for a furry...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - If you are looking for a furry friend, look no further.  Coco is a 6-month-old stray found in Thembalethu.


> She is a friendly, kindhearted girl who is looking for her forever home.


The Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA) has a variety of dogs and cats that are desperately in need of homes.

Please contact them on 044 878 1990 to view all the beautiful animals in their care.

A beautiful and kindhearted girl is waiting for her forever home.

Ready to be placed in my new home.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
